---
name: Bug report
about: Create an issue to help us improve

---

<!---
Before proceeding, please make sure that:

- the title is well defined;
- the appropriate labels are added.
--->

**Description:** this should contain an explanation of the bug.

## Actual behavior

What happens in detail.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen. This should be as close to a counterpart to the above section as possible.

## How to reproduce

1. Steps for reproducing this issue.
2. Please include specific details.

## Additional information

If you have any other information you deem important, please, add it here.

## Suggestions

If you have ideas on how this could be solved, please, add them here.
